source_intake_record.raw_question_text: For the circuit shown in the <image>, D has a transition from 0 to 1 after CLK changes from 1 to 0. Assume gate delays to be negligible. Which of the following statements is true?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: \( Q \) goes to 1 at the CLK transition and stays at 1

choice_map.A: \( Q \) goes to 1 at the CLK transition and stays at 1
choice_map.B: \( Q \) goes to 0 at the CLK transition and stays 0
choice_map.C: \( Q \) goes to 1 at the CLK transition and goes to 0 when D goes to 1
choice_map.D: \( Q \) goes to 0 at the CLK transition and goes to 1 when D goes to 1
